rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN PHOENIX INC. FKA GOLDEN GATE vs. GUTIERREZ, ROLANDO E. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 16, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANT ROLANDO E. GUTIERREZ'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS OFF CALENDAR, DUPLICATE ENTRY. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN PHOENIX INC. FKA GOLDEN GATE vs. GUTIERREZ, ROLANDO E. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 16, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANT ROLANDO E. GUTIERREZ'S (AMENDED) MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO MAY 12, 2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE OPPOSING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: CORNELL M. JANES et al VS. A. W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 16, 2008 LINE 12. DEFENDANT FOSTER WHEELER, L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THE DISCOVERY RESPONSES ARE FACTUALLY DEVOID AND DECEDENT'S TESTIMONY IS NOT ADMISSIBLE AGAINST THIS DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE DOES NOT CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: ADRIATIC INSURANCE COMPANY VS. MOURAD HAMMA HANNACHI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Vacate The Order Granting Df'S Mtn To Vacate The Order Setting Aside The Dfault Of Issa Dughman & App For Renewal Of Mtn To Set Aside The Default Judgment Of Same
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 16, 2008 LINE 2. CROSS-DEFENDANT ISSA FUAD DUGHMAN'S MOTION To Vacate The Order Granting DEFENDANT'S MOTION To Vacate The Order Setting Aside The DEFAULT Of Issa Dughman AND APPLICATION For Renewal Of MOTION To Set Aside The Default Judgment Of Same IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES ARE TO SUBMIT SIMULTANEOUS OPENING BRIEFS ON ALL ISSUES NOT TO EXCEED SEVEN PAGES BY APRIL 25, 2008. THE PARTIES MAY FILE REPLIES NOT TO EXCEED FIVE PAGES ON MAY 2, 2008. THE HEARING IS CONTINUED TO MAY 8, 2008. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD ENNEY et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 16, 2008 LINE 3. DEFENDANT HILL BROTHERS CHEMICAL COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: VIRGINIA E. GARCIA et al VS. RICHARD MICHAEL DOCTOROFF et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 16, 2008 LINE 4. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S (AMENDED) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. ON THE ISSUE OF DANGEROUS CONDITION, DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHIFTED THE BURDEN. THE ACCIDENT HISTORY DATA IS NOT PROBATIVE BECAUSE OF CHANGES TO THE INTERSECTION. THE RYAN DECLARATION ALSO RAISES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT THAT THE CONDITION IS DANGEROUS. ON THE ISSUE OF DESIGN IMMUNITY, IT APPEARS THAT THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO THE MOVEMENT OF VEHICLES WESTBOUND ACROSS POTRERO. SEE PLAINTIFF FACTS 30, 34-36, 45, 48, 50-52. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION IS OVERRULED AS TO EXPERT'S RELIANCE ON THE POLICE REPORT. THE REPORT ITSELF IS NOT ADMITTED. =(302/PJM/AY)

SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 16, 2008 LINE 5. DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. UNDISPUTED MATERIAL FACT NUMBER SIX FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CALIFORNA RULE OF COURT 3.1350. FACT NUMBER EIGHT CANNOT BE SUPPORTED BY COUNSEL'S SUMMARY OF THE DEPOSITION TESTIMONY. DEFENDANT DID NOT ADDRESS IN THE DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF ALL OF THE PRODUCTS ALLEGEDLY DISTRIBUTED OR SOLD BY DEFENDANT. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE MCDERMAND VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 16, 2008 LINE 6. DEFENDANT CARRIER CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ARE DENIED. BOTH ARE BASED ON THE SAME FACTS AND DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES EXPOSURE TO DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS WHILE WORKING ON DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS. IN HIS DEPOSITION, PLAINTIFF DESCRIBES THE WORK AT PAGES 618 AND 1047. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THIS WORK DID NOT EXPOSE PLAINTIFF TO ASBESTOS FROM DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS. IT MAY WELL BE THAT CHANGING A THERMOCOUPLE AND/OR BREAKING CONNECTIONS DO NOT RELEASE ASBESTOS, BUT THE RECORD IS SILENT ON THIS POINT. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: ALLISON AMADOR et al VS. CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY INC., A CALIFORIA et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 16, 2008 LINE 9. DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY INC. AND CAREER EDUCATION CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MAY 7, 2008 PER AMENDED NOTICE. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: LARRY DUBAN VS. DANIEL BERKO et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 16, 2008 LINE 11. DEFENDANT DANIEL BERKO'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE GRAVAMEN OF THE COMPLAINT IS NOT CENTERED ON PROTECTED ACTIVITY. IT IS CENTERED ON DEFENDANT'S ALLEGED FAILURE TO EFFECTIVELY REPRESENT PLAINTIFF IN THE UNDERLYING CASE AND BREACH OF THE DUTY OF LOYALTY. THE ALLEGATIONS RELATED TO PROTECTED ACTIVITY ARE INCIDENTAL TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. SEE FREEMAN V SCHACK (2007) 154 CAL APP 4TH 719, 727-733. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN DAHI VS. ALFREDO CANITES et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 16, 2008 LINE 10. PLAINTIFF SUSAN DAHI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. =(302/PJM)
